title: Enrollment server key and fingerprint pinning
description: Return the server public key and its pinned fingerprint in approved enrollment responses, persist the pin in agent config, and reject later enrollment responses whose fingerprint changes.
acceptance_criteria: Approved EnrollResponse carries server_public_key_z85 and server_public_key_fingerprint.
Pending/rejected enrollment responses do not require a server public key.
AgentConfig persists SERVER_PUBLIC_KEY_FINGERPRINT in TheWatcherAgent.conf and legacy JSON config.
The agent saves the server key and fingerprint after first approved enrollment.
The agent rejects an approved enrollment response if an existing pinned fingerprint does not match.
Docs, CHANGELOG.md, and MODULE.bazel are updated.

tasks.title: Add fingerprint support to protocol and config
tasks.description: Extend common protocol/config structures and tests for server public key fingerprinting.
acceptance_criteria: common/protocol.hpp EnrollResponse includes server_public_key_z85 and server_public_key_fingerprint.
common/crypto.hpp exposes a deterministic server_public_key_fingerprint helper.
Protocol and config tests cover round-trip behavior.

unit: Update common_tests/protocol_test.cpp to assert EnrollResponse key and fingerprint round-trip.
Update agent_tests/config_test.cpp to assert SERVER_PUBLIC_KEY and SERVER_PUBLIC_KEY_FINGERPRINT persist.

tasks.implementation_notes: Use libsodium crypto_generichash over the z85 public key text and hex-encode the 32-byte digest. This pins what the agent receives and uses to configure CURVE.

tasks.title: Return and pin key during enrollment
tasks.description: Have the server include the public key/fingerprint in approved enrollment responses and have the agent persist or verify the fingerprint.
acceptance_criteria: Server approved enrollment responses include config_.server_public_key and its fingerprint.
Agent stores server_public_key and server_public_key_fingerprint on first approval.
Agent throws if a later approved response has a fingerprint that differs from the pinned fingerprint.

unit: Update agent_tests/enrollment_test.cpp for approved enrollment key persistence and fingerprint mismatch rejection.
integration: Update integration_tests/server_agent_integration_test.cpp so the agent starts without a manually configured server public key and learns it through enrollment.

tasks.implementation_notes: Change enroll(AgentConfig&) in agent/enrollment.cpp. It has a mutable AgentConfig reference but not a config path, so persist after enroll returns from agent/main or Agent::start if this object was loaded by main. For tests on enroll(), assert the in-memory config updates; AgentConfig save test covers persistence format.

tasks.title: Document and version
tasks.description: Update configuration/running/security docs, changelog, and module version.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md records enrollment key return and pinning.
Docs describe SERVER_PUBLIC_KEY_FINGERPRINT and enrollment key learning.
tasks.implementation_notes: Current version is 0.2.25; bump to 0.2.26. Update docs/configuration.md, docs/running.md, docs/architecture.md, and docs/dashboard.md if relevant.

nodes.label: Add fingerprint support to protocol and config
